title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 29 - 2018: Google Earthing BouldeRoman Cloud Cities

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his Google Earth project building elaborate 'cloud cities' above 11,500 feet in the Boulder/Rocky Mountain area, describing the many structures he has placed including castles, monasteries, Roman landmarks, the Asterix village, a tiny house village, race tracks, and Roman baths. He shares his creative process and plans to add Delphi next, and mentions his fiancée is visiting for two weeks.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Prefers not to scout ahead — working blind keeps interest and motivation alive
Deeply invested and excited; the desire to see the finished result drives the work
